---
title: "Amy Florence Jones-Bateman"
---

## Amy Florence Jones-Bateman

**Dates:** (b.1859/60)

### Description

daughter of Rowland Jones-Bateman

### Biography

She married (Otterbourne 15 August 1894) Ernest William Marshall.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 2 [1893[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from April 6, 1875

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
